channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Matt Gaetz is dishing out career advice on Cameo
item.description: After announcing he would not return to Congress, Matt Gaetz is trying out a new career path: making personalized videos on Cameo.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: X claims ownership of Infowars accounts
item.description: X, the social platform owned by Elon Musk, is getting involved in the pending bankruptcy sale of conspiracy theorist Alex Jones’s Infowars to the satirical newspaper The Onion.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Fossilized dinosaur feces and vomit help scientists reconstruct the creatures' rise
item.description: Scientists are using used fossilized feces and vomit from Poland to reconstruct how dinosaurs came to dominate the Earth.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: Federal investigators in New York have requested records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: Jake Offenhartz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This TikTok user says a popular YouTube music channel is in fact AI
item.description: Are you really a student if you’ve not done a late night study session soundtracked to an unending lo-fi beats playlist on YouTube? According to Google Trends, searches for the term “lo-fi” on YouTube have tripled since 2020.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Instagram's Threads gets 35 million new users this month
item.description: Nearly 35 million new users have flocked to Instagram's Threads this month as the Meta platform seeks to capture users leaving X and keep an edge over emerging platform Bluesky.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Mulvaney calls DOGE a 'PR campaign,' but respects Musk, Ramaswamy's attempt to reform government
item.description: Former White House chief of staff Mick Mulvaney called the inaugural Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) a “PR campaign,” in a Monday interview, but said he respects the efforts by its appointed leaders, Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, to reform the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Nvidia’s new AI model Fugatto can generate music and audio
item.description: Nvidia on Monday showed a new artificial intelligence model for generating music and audio that can modify voices and generate novel sounds — technology aimed at the producers of music, films and video games.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: PHP updates DOM API
item.description: PHP 8.4.1, an update to the longstanding server-side web scripting language, has been released with features including an updated DOM API that makes it easier to work with HTML5 documents. Accessible from php.net, PHP 8.4.1 was released November 21.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Elon Musk entertains idea of buying MSNBC
item.description: Elon Musk is flirting with the idea of buying MSNBC amid speculation the left-leaning cable news network could be put up for sale.
item.dc:creator: Brian Niemietz, The Mercury News

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI-powered dog robot sniffs out invasive fire ants
item.description: Fueled by artificial intelligence, CyberDog the robotic dog is designed specifically locate fire ant nests, which are endangering ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
